title: The wreck, part two
testCase: Does the list show three bullets, with the sentence below it?
blocks.0.text: Broken again. This time there are three mistakes, and they are of different kinds.
blocks.2.items.0: One list item is opened but never closed.
blocks.2.items.1: Another is closed without ever being opened.
blocks.2.items.2: One emphasis has started and never stopped — see how far the bold text runs.
blocks.3.text: Notice the third: the unclosed <strong> does not complain. It just keeps making everything bold until the page runs out. The browser decided for you.
blocks.4.text: The worst mistakes are not the ones that break the page. The worst are the ones that let it keep working — but wrongly.
